caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a white baseball cap, large headphones, and a black sweatshirt with the word "BOSS" printed in gold letters across the chest. He is seated at a dark table, resting his clasped hands in front of him, with a gold watch visible on his wrist. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of him. To his right is a black mug with red and white text that reads "TALK OUT". In the background, a white banner displays a logo with five stars and the text "URBAN HUSTLE", while a blue sign above reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A small black box with a red logo is also visible on the table to his left. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a stationary seated position, looking slightly to his right with a neutral expression, while the scene remains visually constant.
